FormEventHandlers.Description: If no records in sub collection set new enable to false and refresh

ActiveXScripts.Name: BillingTerms
ActiveXScripts.ActiveXScriptLines_SA:
Option Explicit On
Option Strict On

Imports System
Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic
Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol
Imports Mongoose.Scripting

Namespace SyteLine.FormScripts
    Public Class BillingTerms
        Inherits FormScript

        Sub SetTermsCodeVar()
            Dim TermsCode As String

            TermsCode = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("TermsCode")
            ThisForm.Variables("TermsCodeVar").Value = TermsCode

        End Sub

        Sub SetProxCode()

            If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Advanced") = "0" Then
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxCode", "99")
                ThisForm.Components("ProxCodeEdit").Required = False
                ThisForm.Components("ProxCodeGridCol").Required = False
            Else
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxCode", "")
                ThisForm.Components("ProxCodeEdit").Required = True
                ThisForm.Components("ProxCodeGridCol").Required = True
            End If

            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyModified("ProxDay", True)

        End Sub

        Sub EnableDisableBasedOnMultipleDueDate()
            Dim bMultipleDueDate As Boolean
            bMultipleDueDate = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") <> "0"

            Dim termsSeqsGrid As IWSIDOCollection
            termsSeqsGrid = ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqsGrid").IDOCollection
            If bMultipleDueDate Then
                termsSeqsGrid.NewEnabled = True
            Else
                termsSeqsGrid.NewEnabled = False
            End If

            ThisForm.Components("DiscDaysEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscDaysGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscPctEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscPctGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscountDayEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscDayGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscountMonthsForwardEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscMonthToForwardGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate

            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqSequenceSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqDueDaysOffsetSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqTermsPercentSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
        End Sub
        Sub EnableDisableBasedOnMultipleDueDateButtonClick()
            Dim bMultipleDueDate As Boolean
            bMultipleDueDate = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") <> "0"
            Dim termsSeqsGrid As IWSIDOCollection
            termsSeqsGrid = ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqsGrid").IDOCollection
            If bMultipleDueDate Then
                termsSeqsGrid.NewEnabled = True
            Else
                termsSeqsGrid.NewEnabled = False

                termsSeqsGrid.Refresh()
            End If
            ThisForm.Components("DiscDaysEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscDaysGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscPctEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("DiscPctGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscountDayEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscDayGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscountMonthsForwardEdit").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("ProxDiscMonthToForwardGridCol").Enabled = Not bMultipleDueDate

            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqSequenceSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqDueDaysOffsetSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
            ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqTermsPercentSubGridCol").Enabled = bMultipleDueDate
        End Sub

        Sub RefreshSubCollection()
            Dim oTermsSeqCache As IWSIDOCollection
            oTermsSeqCache = ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqsGrid").IDOCollection
            If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") = "0" And _
                 oTermsSeqCache.GetNumEntries = 1 Then
                Dim termsSeqsGrid As IWSIDOCollection
                termsSeqsGrid = ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqsGrid").IDOCollection
                termsSeqsGrid.Refresh()
            End If
        End Sub
        Function SetFields() As Integer

            Dim oTermsSeqCache As IWSIDOCollection
            Dim oTermsSeqsSecCache As IWSIDOCollection
            Dim iCount As Integer

            oTermsSeqCache = ThisForm.Components("SLTermsSeqsGrid").IDOCollection

            If Not IsDBNull(oTermsSeqCache) Then
                If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerUseMultiDueDates") <> "0" Then
                    If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") = "0" Then
                        If oTermsSeqCache.GetNumEntries > 2 Then
                            If ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("MsgApp", _
                                        "Clear", _
                                        "OK|Cancel", _
                                        "SuccessFailure", _
                                        "mQ=DeleteDueDateRecordsOKCancel", _
                                        "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") <> "0" Then
                                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject()
                                SetFields = -1
                                Exit Function
                            Else
                                oTermsSeqsSecCache = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetSubCollection("SLTermsSeqs", -1)
                                For iCount = 0 To oTermsSeqsSecCache.GetNumEntries - 2
                                    oTermsSeqsSecCache.SetObjectDeleted(iCount, True)
                                    oTermsSeqsSecCache.SetObjectModified(iCount, True)
                                Next
                                oTermsSeqsSecCache = Nothing
                            End If
                        End If
                    Else
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetSubCollection("SLTermsSeqs", -1).Refresh()
                    End If
                Else
                    If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") = "0" Then
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetSubCollection("SLTermsSeqs", -1).Refresh()
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            If (CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscDays")) <> 0 And _
                CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DiscDays")) <> 0) Or _
                (CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscPct")) <> 0 And _
                CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DiscPct")) <> 0) Or _ 
                (CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscDay")) <> 0 And _
                CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ProxDiscDay")) <> 0) Or _
                (CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscMonthToForward")) <> 0 And _
                CDec(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ProxDiscMonthToForward")) <> 0) Then

                If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerUseMultiDueDates") = "0" Then
                    If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") <> "0" Then
                        If ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("MsgApp", _
                                    "Clear", _
                                    "OK|Cancel", _
                                    "SuccessFailure", _
                                    "mQ=ListWillSetOKCancel", _
                                    "(STRINGS(sDiscountPercent), STRINGS(sDiscountDays), STRINGS(sProxDiscountDay) STRINGS(sAnd) STRINGS(sProxDiscountMonthsForward))", _
                                    "STRINGS(sZero)", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") <> "0" Then
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject()
                            SetFields = -1
                            Exit Function
                        Else
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscDays", "0")
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscPct", "0.000")
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscDay", "0")
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscMonthToForward", "0")

                        End If
                    Else
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscDays", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscDays"))
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscPct", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscPct"))
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscDay", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscDay"))
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscMonthToForward", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscMonthToForward"))
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscDays", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscDays"))
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DiscPct", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerDiscPct"))
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscDay", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscDay"))
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("ProxDiscMonthToForward", ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerProxDiscMonthToForward"))
            End If

            oTermsSeqCache = Nothing

        End Function

        Sub SetTotalPercent()

            Dim oTermsSeqCache As IWSIDOCollection
            Dim iCount As Integer
            Dim iTotalPercent As Decimal

            iTotalPercent = 0
            oTermsSeqCache = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetSubCollection("SLTermsSeqs", -1)

            If Not IsDBNull(oTermsSeqCache) Then
                For iCount = 0 To oTermsSeqCache.GetNumEntries - 2
                    If Not oTermsSeqCache.IsObjectDeleted(iCount) Then
                        If IsDBNull(oTermsSeqCache.GetObjectProperty("TermsPercent", iCount)) Or _
                        oTermsSeqCache.GetObjectProperty("TermsPercent", iCount) = "" Then
                            oTermsSeqCache.SetObjectProperty("TermsPercent", iCount, "0")
                        End If
                        iTotalPercent = CDec(oTermsSeqCache.GetObjectProperty("TermsPercent", iCount)) + iTotalPercent
                    End If
                Next
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DerTotalPercent", CStr(iTotalPercent))

            Else
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh("DerTotalPercent", "0.00")

            End If
            oTermsSeqCache = Nothing
        End Sub

        Function ValidateCurrentObjectForSave() As Integer

            Dim oTermsSeqSecCache As IWSIDOCollection
            Dim iCount As Integer
            Dim iValidEnteries As Integer

            If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified Or ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew Or _
            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectInvalid Then
                If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseMultiDueDates") = "1" Then

                    iValidEnteries = 0
                    oTermsSeqSecCache = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetSubCollection("SLTermsSeqs", -1)

                    For iCount = 0 To oTermsSeqSecCache.GetNumEntries - 2
                        If Not oTermsSeqSecCache.IsObjectDeleted(iCount) Then
                            iValidEnteries = iValidEnteries + 1
                        End If
                    Next

                    If IsDBNull(oTermsSeqSecCache) Or iValidEnteries < 2 Then

                        If ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("MsgApp", _
                                    "Clear", _
                                    "OK|Cancel", _
                                    "SuccessFailure", _
                                    "mQ=MustHave2RecordsOkCancel", _
                                    "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") <> "0" Then

                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetObjectInvalid(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex, True)
                            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetObjectModified(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex, True)
                            ValidateCurrentObjectForSave = -1
                            Exit Function
                        Else
                            For iCount = 0 To oTermsSeqSecCache.GetNumEntries - 2
                                oTermsSeqSecCache.SetObjectDeleted(iCount, True)
                                oTermsSeqSecCache.SetObjectModified(iCount, True)
                            Next
                            oTermsSeqSecCache.Refresh()
                        End If
                        ValidateCurrentObjectForSave = -1
                        Exit Function
                    Else
                        If CInt(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerTotalPercent")) <> 100 Then
                            If ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("MsgApp", _
                                        "Clear", _
                                        "Prompt", _
                                        "SuccessFailure", _
                                        "mE=PercentMustTotal100", _
                                        "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") = "0" Then

                                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetObjectInvalid(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex, True)
                                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetObjectModified(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex, True)
                                ValidateCurrentObjectForSave = -1
                                Exit Function
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                    oTermsSeqSecCache = Nothing
                End If
            End If

        End Function

    End Class
End Namespace
